title: Effusiella longispicata

Effusiella longispicata is also commonly categorized under the order Trichocaryonida and the family Cladonemidae. Its classification is further supported by its shared characteristics with other members of the Hydrozoa class, including its simple body structure and the presence of cnidocytes. The precise classification of Effusiella longispicata highlights its unique position among other marine organisms.

intro: Effusiella longispicata, also known as the "Long-spiked Coral Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae.
